free_text: The cross sections of the nuclei formation in the
interaction of 1 GeV protons with nuclei of nickel and
germanium isotope.
Cross sections of Ni-58,Ni-60, Ni-62 and Ni-64 were
respectively
for gamma
as delta-E detector for the detection of charged
particles
mosaic of six Si(Au) detectors, with area 10-cm**2
and thickness of sensitive layer 300 mum each.
sb
Ge-70 and Ge-76 target were used.
